entries.statement: Ability to synthesize strategic intelligence from multiple information sources, integrating market trends, competitive intelligence, organizational data, and technology evolution into coherent strategic recommendations.
Ability to align strategy, business objectives, and technology capabilities, integrating strategic vision, business priorities, and technical capabilities into a unified organizational direction.

Ability to develop organizational data and technology strategy that supports organizational objectives, identifying underlying causes of gaps and establishing strategic direction for data and technology capabilities.

Ability to identify, connect, and influence key stakeholders to speed data and AI adoption, mapping stakeholder relationships, building coalitions, and creating influence channels for organizational change.

Ability to collaborate and coordinate across diverse internal and external stakeholders, sustaining cross-functional teamwork, external partnerships, and stakeholder alignment throughout organizational initiatives.

Ability to lead organizational change and AI adoption, driving transformation efforts, navigating organizational resistance, building leadership support, and communicating change rationale across the organization.

Ability to develop strategic plans and long-range vision for data and AI initiatives, articulating organizational direction, creating roadmaps, and setting strategic priorities aligned with organizational mission.
Ability to conduct market research, analyze trends, and assess competitive intelligence to understand external landscape and inform strategic positioning decisions.
Ability to derive strategic insights from organizational data and analytics, supporting data-driven decision-making and generating evidence-based strategic recommendations.
Ability to communicate strategic initiatives, impact, and organizational direction to executive leadership and stakeholders, delivering strategic briefings and presenting vision and roadmap.
Ability to assess organizational readiness and identify capability gaps for data and AI leadership, evaluating current capabilities and planning capability development initiatives.
Ability to identify and assess data and AI project viability and business value, conducting project evaluation, use case assessment, and go/no-go decision-making aligned with organizational strategy.

Ability to prioritize data and AI investments and allocate resources under strategic constraints, making resource allocation decisions and investment prioritization choices aligned with organizational objectives.
